meta.desc: Dotnet Core examples, tests and experiments pages

footer.noscript: Your browser does not support JavaScript! REALLY?!

error.title: Error
error.400: Bad request: The request cannot be fulfilled due to bad syntax
error.408: The server timed out waiting for the request
error.500: Internal Server Error - server was unable to finish processing the request
error.503: Service unavailable - The server is currently unavailable (because it is overloaded or down for maintenance). Generally, this is a temporary state
error.unknown: That's odd... Something we didn't expect happened 😱

login.title: Log in
login.useLocalAccount: Use a local account to log in.
login.useExternalService: Use another service to log in.
login.noExternalServices: There are no external authentication services configured. See this article for details on setting up this ASP.NET application to support logging in via external services.
login.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

logout.title: Log out
logout.successMessage: You have successfully logged out of the application. Click here to log in again.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.description: You do not have access to this resource.

forgotPasswordConfirmation.title: Forgot password confirmation
forgotPasswordConfirmation.description: Please check your email to reset your password.

lockout.title: Locked out
lockout.description: This account has been locked out, please try again later.

loginWith2fa.title: Two-factor authentication
loginWith2fa.description: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.

loginWithRecoveryCode.title: Recovery code verification
loginWithRecoveryCode.description: You have requested to log in with a recovery code.

resetPasswordConfirmation.title: Reset password confirmation
resetPasswordConfirmation.description: Your password has been reset. Please click here to log in.

deletePersonalData.title: Delete Personal Data
deletePersonalData.description: Deleting this data will permanently remove your account, and this cannot be recovered.

generateRecoveryCodes.title: Generate two-factor authentication (2FA) recovery codes
generateRecoveryCodes.description: Put these codes in a safe place.

personalData.title: Personal Data
personalData.description: Your account contains personal data that you have given us.

resetAuthenticator.title: Reset authenticator key
resetAuthenticator.description: If you reset your authenticator key your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.

setPassword.title: Set password
setPassword.description: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.

puzzles.title: Puzzle Generator
puzzles.description: Combines PNG/JPG/AVIF image with SVG puzzle pattern. Apply scaling, rotation, transform design to fit your needs.

importCsv.title: CSV importer
importCsv.description: Import CSV file, display it in a table and count non-empty cells.
importCsv.noCsv: No CSV data found, please load it first
importCsv.goodResult: Rows count: {{rowsCount}}, non empty cells count: {{nonEmptyCellsCount}}

slide1.desc: Timelapse WebCam Gallery executed every 10 minutes recorded daily and annually

slide2.desc: Simple rainbow tables proof of concept, with hash verification and bruteforce example

slide3.desc: Inkball game - old-school paper game brought to HTML5

slide4.desc: Extensible modularized approach combining best practices of C# dotnet and JavaScript, HTML5 modern design

webCam.title: WebCam
webCam.secsElapsed: secs elapsed since last live-image load

bootstrapTable.formatDuplicateAlertDescription: Please remove or change any duplicate column.
bootstrapTable.formatShowingRows0: Showing {{pageFrom}} to {{pageTo}} of {{totalRows}} rows (filtered from {{totalNotFiltered}} total rows)
